message: Stage -1.2 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start runner=codex/gpt-5.5 status=completed

Stage 0.k surfaced 1 proposed assumption(s) (layer 6 Bucket A hook). Review and decide whether to grant or theorem-split:
  - conjecture "upper" needs assumption [ass:clipped-score-evaluation] (caveat): Needed in the Section 11 variance display $E[\psi_{h_n}(W;\hat\eta^c)^2\mid\hat\eta^c]\le C p_n^{-1}$ and in the foldwise application of Theorem~\ref{thm:localized-aipw}; it applies only to score inputs on the local strata used by Section 11, and it does not collapse the closest prior-result gap because it is a bounded-score regularity caveat rather than a smoothness or identification restriction.

To grant a caveat/latent: append to state.added_assumptions with user_approved=true, set flags.rewind_to_stage0_k=<comma-separated conjecture labels>, then resume.
To theorem-split a regime_defining: redraft the Stage -1.2 proposal to split the affected conjecture; set state.stage_completed=-1.1 and resume.
